sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n72866" key="o)ktwkaideka/shmos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀκτωκαιδεκάσημος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n72866.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of eighteen times,</tr_> in Prosody, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aristid.</author> </bibl> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Quint.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.14</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Anon.</author> </bibl> in <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Musici Scriptores</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.414</biblScope> </bibl> von Jan.</sense> </entryFree>
